query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_users,
       SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deleted_users
FROM users;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active_users,
       SUM(CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deleted_users
FROM users;
